rationale: This is a classic Bus Jam / parking-puzzle fail hook — the mechanic (drag-to-route vehicles, plan-ahead spatial puzzle) has zero overlap with Flappy Dunk's tap-to-fly reflex arcade loop, so adapting it would be misleading creative that tanks post-install retention. Visually it also clashes: the white/green/blue puzzle palette and top-down board view don't match Flappy Dunk's beige+magenta side-scrolling cartoon world with a character avatar. Only the broad hypercasual audience weakly overlaps; do not greenlight this archetype — if you want to borrow the "fail + can you win?" framing, rebuild it natively around a near-miss hoop combo instead.
